name: tradingagents-public-equity-intelligence
description: Public equity research workflows for TradingAgents with source-linked evidence, earnings packs, thesis tracking, and optional institutional vendor imports.

interface.shortDescription: Run source-linked public equity research workflows.
interface.longDescription: TradingAgents Public Equity Intelligence helps Codex prepare company tearsheets, earnings reviews, thesis trackers, and portfolio risk checks using TradingAgents artifacts plus optional vendor exports from Daloopa, Quartr, FactSet, LSEG, S&P Global, Moody's, PitchBook, Datasite, Hebbia, and related sources.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use TradingAgents Public Equity Intelligence to review source quality, earnings evidence, thesis status, and portfolio risk for the selected ticker.
